description: Return a Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) on a specified Project

electronic_signature_id.description: Eletronic Signature ID (present in all views)

created_at.description: Date req was created (present in all views)

company_name.description: User Company name. If the user belongs to a vendor, the vendor name will be returned.

updated_at.description: Date req was last updated (present in all views)

origin_data.description: Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) third party data (present in all views)

origin_id.description: Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) third party ID (present in all views)

payment_date.description: Date requisition was paid (present in all views)

requisition_start.description: Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) start date (present in all views)

requisition_end.description: Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) end date (present in all views)

submitted_at.description: Date requisition was submitted (present in all views)

final.description: true or false value indicating whether or not this is the final invoice (present in all views)

number.description: Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) number (present in all views)

vendor_name.description: Name of Vendor for Invoice (present in all views)

total_claimed_amount.description: Total Claimed Amount for the Invoice (present in all views)

deletable.description: A boolean indicating whether or not the invoice can be deleted. (present in all views)

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

summary.description: Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) summary (present in all views)

negative_new_change_order_item_total.description: Negative new change order item total

negative_previous_change_order_item_tota.description: Negative previous change order item total

positive_new_change_order_item_total.description: Positive new change order item total

positive_previous_change_order_item_tota.description: Positive previous change order item total

total_completed_and_stored_to_date.description: Total completed and stored to date

action_policy.description: Object that describes the action policy for the item (present in action_policy or extended views)
